content_en:
Al-Minhaj Sharh Sahih Muslim has achieved the status of the definitive commentary on Sahih Muslim in the sense that later commentators have consistently worked in relation to it — either building on it, supplementing it, or correcting specific points — rather than attempting to replace it entirely. This canonical status, achieved within a generation of its composition and maintained for eight centuries, reflects the extraordinary quality and comprehensiveness of the work.

The immediate reception of al-Minhaj was enthusiastic. An-Nawawi's students and contemporaries recognized it as a uniquely accomplished work, and it began circulating and being taught almost immediately after its composition. Within a century of an-Nawawi's death, al-Minhaj had become established as the primary reference commentary on Sahih Muslim across the Shafi'i world and was widely used in other schools as well.

The commentary's authority has been enhanced by the general recognition of an-Nawawi as one of the most reliable scholars in Islamic history. His combination of rigorous critical standards, comprehensive erudition, personal piety, and clarity of expression makes citations from al-Minhaj authoritative in a way that few other scholars' works achieve. When an-Nawawi says something in al-Minhaj, that saying carries the weight of his entire scholarly reputation.

For students learning to study hadith through commentary, al-Minhaj is often the first major commentary they encounter after introducing works like Riyadh as-Salihin. Reading al-Minhaj teaches the methodology of hadith commentary by example: the student sees how to move from hadith text to linguistic analysis, from linguistic analysis to legal implications, from legal implications to comparative school analysis, and from comparative analysis to resolution. This methodology, absorbed through reading, forms the foundation for the student's own eventual approach to primary sources.

Contemporary scholars continue to publish supplementary studies on specific sections of al-Minhaj, and the work remains in print in numerous editions across the Muslim world. Its place in Islamic scholarship is secure: it represents the highest achievement of the classical hadith commentary tradition and a permanent resource for anyone seeking to understand Sahih Muslim.
title_id: Status Kanonik dan Otoritas yang Abadi
content_id:
Al-Minhaj Syarh Sahih Muslim telah mencapai status sebagai syarh definitif atas Sahih Muslim dalam pengertian bahwa para pensyarah kemudian secara konsisten bekerja dalam kaitannya dengan karya ini — baik membangun di atasnya, melengkapinya, atau mengoreksi poin-poin tertentu — daripada mencoba menggantikannya sepenuhnya. Status kanonik ini, yang dicapai dalam satu generasi setelah pengarangannya dan dipertahankan selama delapan abad, mencerminkan kualitas dan kelengkapan luar biasa dari karya ini.

Penerimaan langsung atas al-Minhaj sangat antusias. Murid-murid dan rekan-rekan an-Nawawi mengakuinya sebagai karya yang luar biasa, dan ia mulai beredar dan diajarkan hampir segera setelah pengarangannya. Dalam satu abad setelah wafatnya an-Nawawi, al-Minhaj telah menjadi syarh referensi utama atas Sahih Muslim di seluruh dunia Syafi'i dan digunakan secara luas di mazhab-mazhab lain juga.

Otoritas syarh ini telah diperkuat oleh pengakuan umum atas an-Nawawi sebagai salah satu ulama paling dapat diandalkan dalam sejarah Islam. Kombinasinya antara standar kritis yang ketat, erudisi yang komprehensif, kesalehan pribadi, dan kejelasan ekspresi membuat kutipan dari al-Minhaj otoritatif dengan cara yang sedikit dicapai karya ulama lain. Ketika an-Nawawi mengatakan sesuatu dalam al-Minhaj, pernyataan tersebut membawa bobot seluruh reputasi ilmiahnya.

Bagi pelajar yang belajar mempelajari hadis melalui syarh, al-Minhaj seringkali merupakan syarh besar pertama yang mereka temui setelah karya-karya pengantar seperti Riyadh as-Salihin. Membaca al-Minhaj mengajarkan metodologi syarh hadis melalui contoh: pelajar melihat bagaimana berpindah dari teks hadis ke analisis linguistik, dari analisis linguistik ke implikasi hukum, dari implikasi hukum ke analisis mazhab komparatif, dan dari analisis komparatif ke resolusi. Metodologi ini, yang diserap melalui membaca, membentuk fondasi bagi pendekatan pelajar sendiri terhadap sumber-sumber primer.

Para ulama kontemporer terus menerbitkan studi-studi suplementer tentang bagian-bagian tertentu dari al-Minhaj, dan karya ini tetap dicetak dalam berbagai edisi di seluruh dunia Muslim. Tempatnya dalam beasiswa Islam sudah pasti: ia mewakili pencapaian tertinggi tradisi syarh hadis klasik dan sumber daya permanen bagi siapa saja yang mencari pemahaman tentang Sahih Muslim.
content_ar: Al-Minhaj Sharh صحيح مسلم has achieved the status of the definitive commentary on صحيح مسلم in the sense that later commentators have consistently worked in relation to it — either building on it, supplementing it, or correcting specific points — rather than attempting to replace it entirely. This canonical status, achieved within a generation of its composition and maintained for eight centuries, reflects the extraordinary quality and comprehensiveness of the work. The immediate reception of al-Minhaj was enthusiastic. النووي's students and contemporaries recognized it as a uniquely accomplished work, and it began circulating and being taught almost immediately بعد its composition. Within a century of النووي's الموت, al-Minhaj had become established as the الأساسي reference commentary on صحيح مسلم across the الشافعي الدنيا and was widely used in other schools as well. The commentary's authority has been enhanced by the general recognition of النووي as one of the most reliable العلماء in Islamic history. His combination of rigorous البالغ الأهمية standards, comprehensive erudition, personal piety, and clarity of expression makes citations from al-Minhaj المعتمد in a الطريق that few other العلماء' works achieve. عندما النووي says something in al-Minhaj, that saying carries the weight of his entire العلمي reputation. For students learning to study الحديث through commentary, al-Minhaj is often the أولاً major commentary they encounter بعد introducing works like Riyadh as-Salihin. Reading al-Minhaj teaches the methodology of الحديث commentary by example: the student sees how to move from الحديث text to linguistic analysis, from linguistic analysis to legal implications, from legal implications to comparative school analysis, and from comparative analysis to resolution. This methodology, absorbed through reading, forms the foundation for the student's own eventual approach to الأساسي sources. Contemporary العلماء continue to publish supplementary studies on specific sections of al-Minhaj, and the work remains in print in numerous editions across the مسلم الدنيا. Its place in Islamic scholarship is secure: it represents the highest achievement of the الكلاسيكي الحديث commentary التراث and a permanent resource for anyone seeking لفهم صحيح مسلم.
